text: Statement of Purpose My passion for computers started for me as kid when I used to work with Raspberry Pis and has been shaped by both rigorous academic and diverse industry experiences across Germany as an exchange student and Jordan.

Statement of Purpose My passion for computers started for me as kid when I used to work with Raspberry Pis and has been shaped by both rigorous academic and diverse industry experiences across Germany as an exchange student and Jordan. As a student at the German Jordanian University, I've gained a strong foundation in computer engineering, complemented by hands-on projects and international exposure.

A key milestone in my career was a research which I have co-authored that is published in IEEE Access as a Q1 research paper and is called “A Comparative Study of Deep Learning Semantic Segmentation Models for Kidney Segmentation in Ultrasound Images Using The Open Kidney Dataset”.
